{% extends "base.html" %} {% load i18n %} {% block title %}{{ vendor.name }}{% endblock %} {% block sidebar %}{% include "projects/_sidebar.html" with active="vendors" %}{% endblock %} {% block main_class %}col-md-10{% endblock %} {% block content %}
{{ vendor.name }} {% if vendor.phone %}{{ vendor.phone }}{% endif %}
{% trans "Back" %}
{% trans "Total Billed" %}
{{ total_billed|floatformat:0 }}
{% trans "Paid on Bills" %}
{{ total_paid|floatformat:0 }}
{% if total_refunded %}
{% trans "Refunded" %}
{{ total_refunded|floatformat:0 }}
{% endif %}
{% trans "Outstanding Payable" %}
{{ net_payable|floatformat:0 }}
{% trans "Advances Paid" %}
{{ total_advances|floatformat:0 }}
{% trans "Advances Settled" %}
{{ total_settled|floatformat:0 }}
{% if total_cash_direct %}
{% trans "Cash Paid Direct" %}
{{ total_cash_direct|floatformat:0 }}
{% trans "inventory, no payable" %}
{% endif %}
{% trans "Net Due" %}
{{ net_due|floatformat:0 }}
{% trans "payable − advance" %}
{% trans "Total Paid" %}
{{ total_ever_paid|floatformat:0 }}
{% trans "bills paid + cash direct" %}
{% if can_add_financial %}
{% trans "Record Bill" %} {% trans "Advance Payment" %} {% trans "Payment Against Bill" %} {% trans "Advance Settlement" %} {% trans "Vendor Refund" %}
{% endif %}
{% trans "Transaction History" %} ({% trans "last 20" %}) {% trans "Full Payable Ledger" %}
{% if vendor_entries %}
{% for je in vendor_entries %} {% endfor %}
{% trans "Date" %} {% trans "JE#" %} {% trans "Type" %} {% trans "Description" %} {% trans "Amount" %}
{{ je.date }} JE-{{ je.pk|stringformat:"04d" }} {{ je.get_transaction_type_display }} {{ je.description|truncatechars:50 }} {{ je.total_debit|floatformat:2 }}
{% else %}
{% trans "No transactions recorded yet." %}
{% endif %}
{% endblock %}
